my_thoughts: Turn 2: 'I feel angry. I feel like he is telling you how he did so well, and ho'. Student now in victimized_anger. Continuing with comparison_contrast approach. Building on previous turn's foundation.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student: 'I feel angry. I feel like he is telling you how he did so well, and ho'. Shift from unknown to victimized_anger. Teacher applies comparison_contrast mechanism with corrects distortion, clarifies reality. Mid-episode progression in UNMAKING phase.
visible_response: That may be what you heard, but that is not what he said. He said you two had an argument, and he said he thought it would be good if the two of you talked to me about it today. He did not portray himself as “all good,” nor did he portray you as “all bad.”
